name: AirBlade Racer Unit, Torrin
description:
A once abandoned robot for a futuristic sport called AirBlade (Basically Rollerblade but with robots). He's a kindhearted, and sometimes simple minded, but is always looking out for his friends. He takes on the appearance of a nearly 7 foot tall draconic creature. As mentioned before, he is a robot. He's meant to be light to properly be a AirBlade Racer, hence why he's an inflatable. Thankfully he's a little more durable, and self-healing. Other things include:

  • His colour scheme consisting of white, black, and orange.

  • Dawning a black jacket, both casually and on the track

  • Using a sleep mask when in his "recharging state." In other words, sleep.

  • He has braces with jets built into them for AirBlading. They are detachable. And they usually reach the top speeds of a F1 car.

  • He also has goggles for when he's going fast too!


    (Screenshots taken within Pine Ridge, on Roblox)
creator: DGrozelle
